features.title: Remove events system
features.description: Delete lib/events.mjs, remove log-event and read-events subcommands from harness-companion.mjs, remove 2 event hooks from hooks.json, remove events.jsonl references from postmortem-data and role files.
steps: Verify lib/events.mjs does not exist
Verify harness-companion.mjs has no import from lib/events.mjs
Verify SUBCOMMANDS map has no log-event or read-events entries
Verify hooks.json has no post:bash:harness-log-phase or post:agent:harness-log-spawn hooks
Verify postmortem-data case block has no events.jsonl references
Verify coordinator.md and session.md have no events.jsonl references
evidence: Round 1 evaluation: all steps verified via grep and runtime checks
features.notes: Sprint 1 grouping with F-026 and F-027 -- all touch harness-companion.mjs

features.title: Remove codex detection from evaluator
features.description: Remove Section 0 codex pre-flight from evaluator.md, remove Codex Detection Detailed Procedure from advanced.md, remove codex_detection from NN-evaluation.json schema in patterns.md, simplify review_findings schema, remove use_codex from config.json schema.
steps: Verify evaluator.md has no Section 0 codex pre-flight
Verify advanced.md has no Codex Detection Detailed Procedure section
Verify patterns.md NN-evaluation.json schema has no codex_detection object
Verify review_findings in patterns.md is simplified to review_mode, blocking, non_blocking only
Verify config.json schema in patterns.md has no use_codex field
Verify a 2-line runtime-agnostic note replaces removed codex content
Verify coordinator.md has no codex pre-flight enforcement
evidence: Round 1 evaluation: all steps verified via grep and file inspection
features.notes: Sprint 1 grouping with F-025 and F-027

features.title: Remove unused subcommands
features.description: Remove feature-update, verify-round-numbering, and metrics-summary from SUBCOMMANDS map. Delete updateFeature/writeFeatures exports from lib/features.mjs. Remove dead case blocks and imports from harness-companion.mjs.
steps: Verify SUBCOMMANDS map has no feature-update, verify-round-numbering, or metrics-summary entries
Verify lib/features.mjs has no updateFeature or writeFeatures exports
Verify harness-companion.mjs has no import of updateFeature from lib/features.mjs
Verify no dead case blocks remain for removed subcommands
evidence: Round 1 evaluation: all steps verified via grep and runtime checks
features.notes: Sprint 1 grouping with F-025 and F-026

features.title: Standardize sprint artifact naming
features.description: Rename artifact patterns: contract->proposal, contract-review->review, builder-report->report, evaluation->eval. Update patterns.md, lib/artifacts.mjs, postmortem-data, finalize-round, and all role files.
steps: Verify patterns.md artifact layout uses NN-proposal.md, NN-review.md, NN-report.md, NN-eval.md, NN-eval.json
Verify patterns.md templates reference new artifact names
Verify lib/artifacts.mjs validate-artifacts checks new filenames
Verify postmortem-data reads NN-eval.json not NN-evaluation.json
Verify finalize-round reads NN-eval.json
Verify evaluator.md, generator.md, coordinator.md, session.md reference new names
Grep for old names (contract.md, builder-report, evaluation.md) returns zero matches in active code
features.notes: Sprint 2 grouping with F-029 -- both touch patterns.md and role files

features.title: Consolidate root artifacts and simplify enums
features.description: Remove init.md, summary.md, decomposition.md from artifact layout. Simplify feature status to pending/done, maturity to draft/reviewed/accepted. Remove supervised-step mode alias. Update all schemas and role files.
steps: Verify patterns.md artifact layout has no init.md, summary.md, or decomposition.md
Verify patterns.md decomposition.md template is removed
Verify features.json schema in patterns.md uses pending/done for status
Verify features.json schema in patterns.md uses draft/reviewed/accepted for maturity
Verify state.json schema has no supervised-step mode reference
Verify lib/features.mjs validation accepts new enum values
Verify planner.md has no decomposition.md references

features.title: Auto-postmortem with drift detection
features.description: Coordinator auto-calls postmortem-data on all_required_pass. postmortem-data uses git log for timeline. finalize-round adds drift_warning when score drops >1. Releaser guards on postmortem.md existence.
steps: Verify coordinator.md instructs auto-call of postmortem-data when check-stop returns all_required_pass
Verify postmortem-data uses git log --oneline for timeline reconstruction
Verify postmortem-data has no events.jsonl references
Verify finalize-round outputs drift_warning field when a criterion score drops >1
Verify releaser.md checks postmortem.md existence before allowing release

features.title: Inline metrics into postmortem-data and trim SKILL.md
features.description: Delete lib/metrics.mjs. Move summarizeMetrics logic inline into postmortem-data case block. Remove metrics imports from harness-companion.mjs. Trim SKILL.md by 100-150 lines. Verify only 1 hook in hooks.json.
steps: Verify lib/metrics.mjs does not exist
Verify harness-companion.mjs has no import from lib/metrics.mjs
Verify postmortem-data case block contains inlined metrics summary logic
Verify SKILL.md is trimmed by 100-150 lines compared to v2.2.2 baseline
Verify hooks.json has exactly 1 hook entry (post:bash:harness-progress-update)

features.title: End-to-end verification of simplified harness
features.description: Run each remaining subcommand with representative inputs. Verify new artifact naming, postmortem-data auto-trigger, drift detection, simplified enums, and hooks.json final state.
steps: Run each remaining subcommand with representative inputs and verify JSON output
Run validate-artifacts --round 1 with new naming and verify correct validation
Verify postmortem-data auto-triggers when check-stop returns completion
Verify finalize-round drift detection produces drift_warning when score drops >1
Verify pending/done and draft/reviewed/accepted enums work across features.json operations
Verify hooks.json has exactly 1 hook entry
features.notes: Conditional sprint -- skip if Sprints 1-3 evaluations already cover these verifications
